title: narcissus hispanicus subsp. bujei
intro: Narcissus hispanicus subsp. bujei is a subspecies of the Narcissus hispanicus, a type of daffodil native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus hispanicus subsp. bujei include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving congestion and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health and wellness.
